## Context

<What forces this decision; what's at stake; what's changed that requires us to decide now>

## Decision heuristic — why ADR (check all that apply)

- [ ] Decision affects >1 module
- [ ] Decision has a >1-year cost-of-change
- [ ] Decision involves Red zone files
- [ ] Decision has 2+ viable approaches with non-trivial tradeoffs
- [ ] Decision is irreversible (one-way door per Bezos taxonomy)

- **Cost:** S / M / L / XL
- **Reversibility:** one-way / two-way door
- **Blast radius if wrong:** <what breaks; who notices>
